posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran issues a warning for US and Israeli-linked industrial companies in the region to evacuate their workplaces.

Iran also issues a warning for strikes on steel plants in the Gulf and Israel following US and Israeli strikes on Iranian steelmakers this morning.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Pattern recognition system creates your version of reality.  Not necessarily what is real
